title: Implement Custom Span Attributes & Baggage
description: Enrich distributed traces with relevant business-specific dimensions using custom span attributes. Utilize baggage for propagating contextual information across service boundaries. Mitigate high-cardinality explosions when adding custom attributes to avoid data store performance issues.
objectives: Enrich distributed traces with relevant business-specific dimensions using custom span attributes.
Utilize baggage for propagating contextual information across service boundaries.
Mitigate high-cardinality explosions when adding custom attributes to avoid data store performance issues.
